missionDescription: NexusHive is your single partner for all startup infrastructure needs. We build Audit-ready, Investor-ready systems with a scalability mindset—eliminating multiple vendor headaches forever.
founderSummary: Qualified Advocate & ISO-certified POSH Practitioner with 15+ years of cross-industry experience in Law, HR, and Compliance.
founderAboutParagraphs: Jaya is a founding partner at the firm's Bangalore office. Since launching NexusHive, she has pioneered a multi-disciplinary approach to startup infrastructure, merging legal precision with operational excellence. Her leadership has been instrumental in helping ventures navigate the complexities of India's regulatory landscape with institutional-grade stability.

As a Qualified Advocate and ISO-certified POSH Practitioner, Jaya specializes in building "Audit-Ready" systems. She has conducted over 60+ POSH trainings across multiple sectors, ensuring that workplaces are not only compliant but also safe and progressive environments for growth.
accolades: Member of Bar Council of India & Karnataka
60+ POSH trainings conducted across high-growth sectors
Diploma in Training & Development from ISTD, New Delhi
